category_sources: source_facts.description says Glorious Glasgow Haskell Compilation System; official GHC homepage describes GHC as an open-source compiler and interactive environment for Haskell.
display_name_sources: Official GHC homepage headline says The Glasgow Haskell Compiler; source_facts.name is ghc.
docs_sources: Official GHC documentation page links to the User's Guide, libraries, and GHC API; official downloads.haskell.org hosts the latest User's Guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official GHC homepage directs contributors to GHC on GitLab, and the canonical project repository is gitlab.haskell.org/ghc/ghc.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables include ghc, ghci, runghc, haddock; official GHC homepage identifies compiler and interactive environment for Haskell.
